name: AI Infrastructure Cycles Rotation
description: Invest in sequential AI infrastructure cycles (chips → energy → nuclear/protons → cooling → robotics) based on Leopold Aschenbrenner's Situational Awareness thesis. Rotate into each cycle before the crowd.
instrument: Various ETFs and stocks per cycle

setup.description: AI growth requires infrastructure in waves. Each cycle becomes the bottleneck that must be solved before AI can scale further. Invest in the next bottleneck before it becomes consensus.

1_chips.thesis: AI training requires massive GPU compute

2_energy.thesis: Datacenters need enormous power. Grid capacity is the bottleneck.

3_nuclear_protons.thesis: Nuclear is the only scalable clean baseload power for AI datacenters

4_cooling_infrastructure.thesis: Datacenter cooling becomes critical as power density increases

5_robotics_physical_ai.thesis: AI moves from digital to physical world — robotics, autonomous systems

entry.long: Buy cycle basket when thesis identifies it as next bottleneck

exit.hold_until: Cycle becomes consensus / crowded, then rotate to next

notes: The key insight is TIMING — each cycle starts before the previous one peaks. Leopold was in energy/nuclear before the crowd moved past chips.
